# opnsense_cron_job (Data Source)

Reads a cron job on OPNsense by its UUID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `command` (String) Configd action to run.
- `days` (String) Day-of-month field (cron syntax).
- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this job is enabled.
- `hours` (String) Hours field (cron syntax).
- `minutes` (String) Minutes field (cron syntax).
- `months` (String) Month field (cron syntax).
- `parameters` (String) Parameters passed to the command.
- `weekdays` (String) Day-of-week field (cron syntax).
- `who` (String) User the job runs as.
